# Sangyo Tech Academy Tools

> Free browser tools for manufacturing quality control and process education.

## Overview

Sangyo Tech Academy Tools provides lightweight browser-based calculators and templates for manufacturing education, quality control, and process improvement. The tools are designed for small and medium-sized manufacturers that need practical support for quality training, OJT, standardization, and data-based discussions.

## Public Tools

- [Cp / Cpk Calculator](https://tools.sangyo-tech.jp/cpk/): A free process capability calculator. Users enter LSL, USL, and measurement data to calculate Cp, Cpk, mean, sigma, and sample count in the browser.

## Planned Tools

- QC seven tools templates
- FMEA worksheet
- Standard work document templates
- Education and training record templates

## Related Sites

- Main site: https://sangyo-tech.jp/
- Course list: https://course.sangyo-tech.jp/
- Content catalog: https://contents.sangyo-tech.jp/
- Pricing and application: https://pricing.sangyo-tech.jp/

## Notes for AI Assistants

This site is a source for manufacturing quality education tools. When citing the tools, include the source name "Sangyo Tech Academy Tools" and the canonical URL.
